# Observability and alert management

Operators configure how Vault Radar findings are surfaced and routed. Vault Radar integrates with ticketing and alerting systems to provide real-time alerting and automation. Alerting and automation enable faster time to resolution and fit directly into existing security and engineering workflows.

<!-- EDITORIAL REWRITE (HVD 2.0 migration): alerting and ticketing configuration relocated here from the source "Set up Vault Radar" page, and notification integrations from the source "Remediation" page, because configuring alert/notification routing is operator (Administration) work per spec §8.4. Please review. -->

## Configure alerting

Follow the documentation page for configuring alerting for the following supported platforms:

- [PagerDuty](https://developer.hashicorp.com/hcp/docs/vault-radar/get-started/set-up-alerting/pagerduty/setup)
- [Slack](https://developer.hashicorp.com/hcp/docs/vault-radar/get-started/set-up-alerting/slack/setup) and [Slack App](https://developer.hashicorp.com/hcp/docs/vault-radar/get-started/set-up-alerting/slack/slack-app)
- [Splunk](https://developer.hashicorp.com/hcp/docs/vault-radar/get-started/set-up-alerting/splunk)
- [Microsoft Teams](https://developer.hashicorp.com/hcp/docs/vault-radar/get-started/set-up-alerting/microsoft-teams)

## Configure ticketing

Follow the documentation page for configuring ticketing for the following supported platforms:

- [Jira](https://developer.hashicorp.com/hcp/docs/vault-radar/get-started/set-up-ticketing/jira)
- [ServiceNow](https://developer.hashicorp.com/hcp/docs/vault-radar/get-started/set-up-ticketing/servicenow/setup)

## Notification integrations

Notification integrations allow Vault Radar administrators to notify development teams when there is an event that needs remediation. We support integrations with:

- Microsoft Teams
- Jira
- ServiceNow
- Splunk
- PagerDuty
- Slack

Once notifications reach a development team, the consumer-facing remediation experience is covered in the User Guide: [Remediation workflows](/validated-designs/vault-radar/user-guide/remediation-workflows).
